title: Autonomic and URC Unveil Expanded M Series Support and Faster UI Performance
bodyHtml:
Autonomic and URC Unveil Expanded M Series Support and Faster UI Performance

Now compatible with the M5 PRO and M3 music servers for smarter control, faster listening access, and personalized listening.

Autonomic and URC have announced a major integration update, delivering enhanced support for the latest Autonomic M5 PRO and M3 music servers and introducing new features that elevate the user experience.

‍

‍

The updated URC module (Version 2.4.2) is designed to offer integrators and homeowners a more personalized, responsive, and intuitive audio control experience.

Key Enhancements

  • Expanded M Series Support — The latest update adds full support for the new M5 PRO and M3 music servers, including M Series inputs on the Browse Screen and advanced two-way commands for seamless integration.
  • Personalized Favorites and Streaming Accounts — Each household member can now customize their own favorites and link their personal streaming accounts to their own profile, ensuring a tailored listening experience for everyone.
  • New Menu Favorites for Quick Access — Instantly access frequently used content with the new Menu Favorites feature, making it easier than ever to jump into preferred stations, playlists, or sources.
  • Smart Naming for Favorites and Scenes — Creating favorites and automation scenes is now more intuitive, with the system suggesting names based on content for a streamlined setup process.
  • Fast UI Performance — Enjoy a significantly faster startup experience, with now-playing metadata loading up to four seconds quicker when launching the interface.
  • Refinements and Bug Fixes — Additional technical enhancements ensure a smoother, more reliable experience across the board.

‍

‍

“Autonomic is a favorite audio integration among our dealers, so this updated module is valuable news for our community and end-users,” states Lars Granoe, URC’s VP of product. “URC and Autonomic continue to partner for leadership in residential and commercial streaming audio solutions.”

“This update reflects our commitment to providing seamless, high-performance integrations that enhance both the installer and end-user experience,” says Michael de Nigris, CEO at Autonomic. “With full support for our new M Series and thoughtful refinements like personalized favorites, we continue to deliver best-in-class audio solutions.”

‍
Originally published at: https://www.residentialsystems.com/technology/audio/autonomic-and-urc-unveil-expanded-m-series-support-and-faster-ui-performance

‍
